message:
Merge pull request #209 from llm-d-incubation/andy-helm3

updated files to consume llmd model name and modelID

files.patch:
@@ -50,11 +50,10 @@ cd $WVA_PROJECT/charts
 helm upgrade -i workload-variant-autoscaler ./wva-llmd-infra \
   -n $WVA_NS \
   --set-file prometheus.caCert=/tmp/prometheus-ca.crt \
-  --set hfToken=$HF_TOKEN \
   --set variantAutoscaling.accelerator=L40S \
   --set variantAutoscaling.modelID=unsloth/Meta-Llama-3.1-8B \
   --set vllmService.enabled=true \
-  --set vllmService.nodePort=30000 \
+  --set vllmService.nodePort=30000
 ```
 
 ### INSTALL LLM-D

@@ -1,7 +0,0 @@
-apiVersion: v1
-kind: Secret
-metadata:
-  name: llm-d-hf-token
-  namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }}
-stringData:
-  HF_TOKEN: {{ .Values.hfToken | quote }}

@@ -1,3 +1,4 @@
+{{- if .Values.wva.hpa.enabled }}
 apiVersion: autoscaling/v2
 kind: HorizontalPodAutoscaler
 metadata:
@@ -7,7 +8,7 @@ spec:
   scaleTargetRef:
     apiVersion: apps/v1
     kind: Deployment
-    name: ms-inference-scheduling-llm-d-modelservice-decode
+    name: {{ printf "%s-decode" .Values.wva.modelName }}
   # minReplicas: 0  # scale to zero - alpha feature
   maxReplicas: {{ .Values.hpa.maxReplicas }}
   behavior:
@@ -30,7 +31,8 @@ spec:
         name: inferno_desired_replicas
         selector:
           matchLabels:
-            variant_name: ms-inference-scheduling-llm-d-modelservice-decode
+            variant_name: {{ printf "%s-decode" .Values.wva.modelName }}
       target:
         type: AverageValue
         averageValue: {{ .Values.hpa.targetAverageValue | quote }}
+{{- end }}

@@ -22,9 +22,9 @@ data:
       - model: llama0-70b
         slo-tpot: 80
         slo-ttft: 500
-      - model: unsloth/Meta-Llama-3.1-8B
-        slo-tpot: 9
-        slo-ttft: 1000
+      - model: {{ .Values.variantAutoscaling.modelID }}
+        slo-tpot: {{ .Values.variantAutoscaling.sloTpot }}
+        slo-ttft: {{ .Values.variantAutoscaling.sloTtft }}
   freemium.yaml: |
     name: Freemium
     priority: 10

@@ -1,10 +1,11 @@
+{{- if .Values.wva.va.enabled }}
 apiVersion: llmd.ai/v1alpha1
 # Optimizing a variant, create only when the model is deployed and serving traffic
 # this is for the collector the collect existing (previous) running metrics of the variant.
 kind: VariantAutoscaling
 metadata:
   # Unique name of the variant
-  name: ms-inference-scheduling-llm-d-modelservice-decode 
+  name: {{ printf "%s-decode" .Values.wva.modelName }}
   namespace: {{ .Values.llmd.namespace }}
   labels:
     inference.optimization/acceleratorName: {{ .Values.variantAutoscaling.accelerator }}
@@ -45,3 +46,4 @@ spec:
             gamma: "5.2"
             delta: "0.1"
         maxBatchSize: 512
+{{- end }}
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -1,17 +1,19 @@
+{{- if .Values.vllmService.enabled }}
 apiVersion: v1
 kind: Service
 metadata:
   name: vllm-service
   namespace: {{ .Values.llmd.namespace }}
   labels:
-    llm-d.ai/model: ms-inference-scheduling-llm-d-modelservice
+    llm-d.ai/model: {{ .Values.wva.modelName }}
 spec:
   selector:
-    llm-d.ai/model: ms-inference-scheduling-llm-d-modelservice
+    llm-d.ai/model: {{ .Values.wva.modelName }}
   ports:
     - name: vllm
       port: 8200
       protocol: TCP
       targetPort: 8200
       nodePort: {{ .Values.vllmService.nodePort }}
   type: NodePort
+{{- end }}
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -1,17 +1,19 @@
+{{- if .Values.vllmService.enabled }}
 apiVersion: monitoring.coreos.com/v1
 kind: ServiceMonitor
 metadata:
   name: vllm-servicemonitor
   namespace: {{ .Values.wva.monitoringNamespace }}
   labels:
-    llm-d.ai/model: ms-inference-scheduling-llm-d-modelservice
+    llm-d.ai/model: {{ .Values.wva.modelName }}
 spec:
   selector:
     matchLabels:
-      llm-d.ai/model: ms-inference-scheduling-llm-d-modelservice
+      llm-d.ai/model: {{ .Values.wva.modelName }}
   endpoints:
   - port: vllm
     path: /metrics
-    interval: 15s
+    interval: {{ .Values.vllmService.interval }}
   namespaceSelector:
-    any: true
\ No newline at end of file
+    any: true
+{{- end }}
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -1,11 +1,11 @@
 wva:
   baseName: inference-scheduling
-  namespace: llm-d-inference-scheduling
   image:
     repository: ghcr.io/llm-d/workload-variant-autoscaler
     tag: v0.0.1
 
   replicaCount: 1
+  modelName: ms-inference-scheduling-llm-d-modelservice
 
   monitoringNamespace: openshift-user-workload-monitoring
 
@@ -14,18 +14,25 @@ wva:
     port: 8443
     secure: true
 
+  hpa:
+    enabled: true
+
+  va:
+    enabled: true
+
 prometheusAdapter:
   enabled: true
   namespaceOverride: openshift-user-workload-monitoring
 
 llmd:
   namespace: llm-d-inference-scheduling
 
-hfToken: "" # required
-
 variantAutoscaling:
+  enabled: true
   accelerator: L40S
   modelID: "unsloth/Meta-Llama-3.1-8B"
+  sloTpot: 9
+  sloTtft: 1000
 
 hpa:
   maxReplicas: 10
@@ -40,6 +47,7 @@ guidellm:
 vllmService:
   enabled: true
   nodePort: 30000
+  interval: 15s
 
 prometheus:
   baseURL: "https://thanos-querier.openshift-monitoring.svc.cluster.local:9091"
